title: Shinji caught in the act
wikitext:
[]: Shinji caught in the act?             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Apr 10, 2005 1:53 am You know for awhile I've always thought this about that scene where Shinji wanks off to comatose Asuka in End of Eva. Nerv would almost certainly have security cameras in the room, in fact I think at some point either in ep 24 or end of eva (forget which) they actually show a camera feed through a monitor to Asukas hospital room. I'll have to watch them again to make sure later. Anyway if this is the case that means that Shinji should have been caught in the act so to speak. But I guess nerv had better things to do then watch Asukas room all day which is why he got away with it. Man would it be embarrassing if Shinji was caught in the act...I could just imagine it :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 10, 2005 3:34 am Luckily for him, the evidence gets destroyed, along with the rest of the Geofront.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Apr 10, 2005 8:33 am The camera feed of Asuka's hospital room was in Episode 24. Considering how many cameras Nerv HQ probably has, it would be impossible to monitor everything at all time. Generally, you either have a big wall of monitors, or a rotating camera feed. In either case, its difficult to monitor everything. Besides, you're thinking too much in real terms. He would only have been caught in the act if it was vital to the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Apr 10, 2005 9:11 am Reichu wrote: Luckily for him, the evidence gets destroyed, along with the rest of the Geofront.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 10, 2005 9:56 am I'd imagine that they'd use the MAGI or one of the attached systems to do that sort of boring monitoring, and only bother with human intervention on a life systems telemetry alarm. With the NERV budget cuts, sedation would be a more attractive (i.e. cheaper) option than 24x7 suicide watch.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Apr 27, 2005 12:13 pm Camera or no, Gendou knows. Gendou knows everything...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue May 03, 2005 7:06 pm Reichu wrote: Luckily for him, the evidence gets destroyed, along with the rest of the Geofront.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 03, 2005 11:26 pm EVA-01X wrote: ...Along with the rest of the world...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Wed May 04, 2005 5:04 pm Execpt for the fact that Japan was probably ripped apart by the black moon getting torn out by it's roots... And probably most of asia with it.... But in all I was refering to the people of the earth, not so much the planet I think

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 04, 2005 5:52 pm EVA-01X wrote: Execpt for the fact that Japan was probably ripped apart by the black moon getting torn out by it's roots... And probably most of asia with it.... But in all I was refering to the people of the earth, not so much the planet I think

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 04, 2005 5:59 pm EVA-01X wrote: Execpt for the fact that Japan was probably ripped apart by the black moon getting torn out by it's roots... And probably most of asia with it....

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed May 04, 2005 6:57 pm Do you think Reis big giant head would be enough to make a nuclear winter? Normally the problem with nuclear winters is that it completely kills off peoples food supply which result in everyone starving to death. But as Shinji and Asuka are the only people on the planet they could probably wait it out with a large stash of food.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 04, 2005 7:42 pm I wonder though, if all the happening in the Geofront were being recorded and sent off to offsite backups all over the world. Kind of a record of the history of humanity if the worst happened. That might explain at least why everyone on the bridge bothered to keep monitoring the situation when it was obvious nothing they did was going to matter after the next ten minutes. Or maybe they were just that professional!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed May 04, 2005 7:47 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I wonder though, if all the happening in the Geofront were being recorded and sent off to offsite backups all over the world. Kind of a record of the history of humanity if the worst happened. That might explain at least why everyone on the bridge bothered to keep monitoring the situation when it was obvious nothing they did was going to matter after the next ten minutes. Or maybe they were just that professional!

[]:             Quote Post by Misuzu » Wed May 25, 2005 4:45 pm so what if he was monitored while jerking off to a half naked Asuka? lol he's 14 yrs old, i'd say that's pretty "normal"

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 7:20 pm Misuzu wrote: so what if he was monitored while jerking off to a half naked Asuka? lol he's 14 yrs old, i'd say that's pretty "normal"

[]:             Quote Post by Misuzu » Wed May 25, 2005 7:40 pm well ok, it's not really normal. but we all know Shinji is a little messed up in the head.

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Thu Jun 16, 2005 12:40 am Defectron wrote: Do you think Reis big giant head would be enough to make a nuclear winter?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jun 16, 2005 1:29 am ummm... somehow i cant think of how something nonnuclear could cause nuclear winter

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jun 16, 2005 3:01 am sadsadshinji wrote: ummm... somehow i cant think of how something nonnuclear could cause nuclear winter
